judged_items.prompt: What does a contract's worth mean?
judged_items.label: pair_85
judged_items.text:
The worth of a contract is the amount of money that will be paid to the person who wrote it if it is not signed. It is the price you pay for the right to get something (like a job) for free.
The word worth is a synonym of value. And a contract is a legal agreement between two or more people. The value of the contract is the same thing as the worth of the contract.
So, if you have a contract for a job that pays $1000 and you are not going to take it, the worth of that contract is $1000. If you do take the job, then the worth of that contract is zero.

judged_items.prompt: Income tax , its purpose and why it exists . I feel incredibly stupid ; but why / how was it conceived , and who did it ? Explain like I'm five.
judged_items.label: pair_93
judged_items.text:
Oh no, you're not stupid. I'm happy to explain!

So, imagine you're a king or queen. You've got a big kingdom with lots of people. 

Now, all those people need to work to make money, right? But they're not allowed to keep all the money they make. They have to give some to the king or queen. 

That's where income tax comes in. 

You see, before income tax, people didn't have to give anything to the king or queen. They kept all their money. 

The king or queen thought "Hey, that's not fair!" 

So, they said "Ok, from now on, people have to give some of their money to the king or queen."

judged_items.prompt: How does the bail system work in the USA ? if you ' post bail ' of $ 15,000 , say , do you get it back or what ? Do you get it back if the person was innocent or is it gone either way ? Please explain like I'm five.
judged_items.label: pair_68
judged_items.text:
The bail system is one of the most important aspects of the American justice system. It is a system wherein the accused is given a sum of money which he is required to pay as a guarantee that he will come to court for the trial . And if he is found guilty of the crime then he is liable to pay the same to the government . And if he is found innocent he gets back the same .
My question is : what if he is found innocent ? Will he get back the money he paid as bail ? Please explain this in simple terms .

If you see a post that you think is not interesting , you can downvote it , and that bot will probably downvote it too . And you get the idea . It is pretty easy to do , and you can make a bot in about 10 minutes .
